title: Yasuie’s Execution Shakes Wano
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Orochi, Unknown person #2, Yasuie, Orochi Forces, Unknown person #3 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: Yasuie’s execution exposes Orochi’s cruelty and the tragedy of the SMILE victims in Ebisu Town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: of all the regions in Wano,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Once upon a time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hakumai alone has a true harbor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Good and bad ships alike will come.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Which means that we must

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Be an iron force of righteous-ness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RAAAGGGGGGGGGGHHHHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, the fear- less samurai of Wano sure are a sight to behold...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't the time for you to be lost in admiration, Oden! How long are you going to wallow in self-pity!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Despite it all, you are still the son of the Shogun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was driven out of the castle. My blood means naught now.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's on everyone's lips. In the wake of the passing of Sukiyaki Kozuki, not open,

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: But Yasuieie will rise as Shogun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You imbecile!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Owww!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yours are the shoulders upon which the future of the Kozuki clan will one day rest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Sukiyaki's disowment is but strict- mess born of love!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Show him your true worth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: More than all that, Yasa, I....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I want to sail the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why won't this country let me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Isolationism is so terribly stifling!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Silence! You will only be allowed to prate on

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Once you've proved yourself as a warrior!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That hurt, damn it! quit punching me already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know who the hell I am?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: nobody: Yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're still a two-bit pip- squeak!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I was born in Hakumai!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie! I'm so glad you're still safe!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: Flower Capital, RaseTSU Town JAIUHOUSE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This man, just last night, committed robbery in this town!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How he has fallen! He lives in Ebisu Town town,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And makes his living as a Jester! The former Daimyo of Hakumai!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Yasuieie Shimotsuki himself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is sentenced to execution, a sacrifice that will die alongside the courtesan Komurasaki!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: According to the man himself, he has terrorized the capital for some time

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As the midnight boy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was a lie! I knew I was going to die anyway, so I thought

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd get myself a bit of fame on my way out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh?! are you serious?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew the timings of the crime were a bit odd...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, he showed up a bit before midnight, so he's actually the eleven-thirty boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My dad for lying!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm no hero!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then why did you steal?

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: The crowds here for Komurasaki's funeral

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have all turned their attention to Yasuieie's execution.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Drake, Sir!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The townspeople of ebisu have made their way into the flower capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this man... it seems he's far more of a bigshot

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: than we could have imagined!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Everyone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Entrance to the flower capital

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Stop! Return home!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! You louts! You can't just enter the capi- Tal whenever you please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let us see Tonyasu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't you dare kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Stop, you paupers!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Yasuie! You can't die on us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you go, who'll support all of us!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 65 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
